diagrams.title: sigaction Structure Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the four members of struct sigaction and their types
diagrams.purpose: Understand the components of sigaction structure for proper initialization

diagrams.title: Signal Flow with sigaction
diagrams.description: Shows how signals travel from source to handler execution
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete signal handling flow and where sigaction controls apply

diagrams.title: SA_SIGINFO Handler vs Simple Handler
diagrams.description: Comparison of simple signal handler and extended handler with siginfo_t
elements: Extended: void handler(int signo, siginfo_t *info, void *context)
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to use SA_SIGINFO and access to sender information
